title: Step Up!
description: Step up entire blocks with ease! Your Space Bar will thank you!
body:
# Features of Step up!
Step Hight changed to 1 to allow the player to step up whole blocks. If an outside force changes the step hight to a value greater than 1 then that value will be used until outside force is removed. Or in other words, You can step up entire blocks. If lets say a piece of armor allows you to step up two blocks, that armor will override Step Up until removed.

## Q&A 

1. Q, _Will you port to older versions?_

   A, **I am currently unable to at this time sorry.**

2. Q, _Will you port to newer versions?_

   A. **I will attempt to keep up with the latest versions whenever I am free to do so. And whenever MCreator updates.**

3. Q, _Will you make a Fabric version?_

   A, **Once I can fix an issue with the Fabric Generator I do wish to make Fabric versions. But as of right now it is not guaranteed I will.**


I used MCreator to Create this mod. If you would like to make your own port of this mod please contact me at sebwill912@gmail.com before doing so.
